/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libc1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libc1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/c1_driver/msg/detail/velinfo__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c1_driver__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/c1_driver/msg/detail/velquery__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/doanh/atlas_c1/build/c1_driver: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libc1_driver__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
